title: Obtain the Sinner
text: My services don't come cheap. Summoning me in such a brusk manner. I take it you've already decided on a destination.

title: Raise to Phase 1
text: Once you board my caravan, there's no turning back.

title: Raise to Phase 3
text: Ah, finally, I can take a nice, long break.

title: Win Battles
text: Don't worry, I've taken care of everything. It's all over now.

title: Lose Battles
text: How dare you raid my dog?

title: Greeting
text: Have you forgotten that I'm a smuggler? Coming to my place so often. Aren't you even a little afraid of whiskey away someday? Hmm. I wonder how much ransom the NBCC would pay to get you back.

title: Conversation 1
text: Even dreams come with a price tag. People are willing to pay astronomical sons to achieve layers. Those who hesitate are just looking for a better deal.

title: Conversation 2
text: Whenever our caravan passes through the city customs, a beautiful chime rings out. I must let you hear it sometime. It's the sound of dreams shattering against reality.

title: Conversation 3
text: For the right price, my caravan can transport anyone to any place in the world. But, whether the client is still breathing upon arrival, well, that's not something I can guarantee.

title: Special Conversation 1
text: Don't mourn for the treasures buried in white sands. Dzius, Ebb, and Flo was just the nature of these end times. How about we share a laugh and bid them all farewell?

title: Special Conversation 2
text: If you want to be like me, freely roaming white sands, owning a cozy hideaway, and able to enjoy east side desserts whenever I please. Remember this. People's hearts are your most valuable asset. Hold them close and don't hesitate to use them.

title: Special Conversation 3
text: It's a shame that I'm enjoying such lovely weather all alone. Why don't you toss aside your work for a bit as well? Let's just sit quietly together without thinking about anything. And watch the crowds come and go.

title: Full Compliance
text: If one day the name vaults up blue vanishes from white sands, he'd my advice, don't go searching for her. She's just flown too long too far, and needs to rest her wings. Your well wishes will suffice, pray for her, to find a nest to call home.

title: Idle
text: How dare you? Your daydreaming again. Are you worried I might sell you off to the Outlands?

title: Annoyed
text: How dare you? Your daydreaming again. Are you worried I might sell you off to the Outlands?

title: Special Attention
text: Didn't get your film earlier? Come closer then. Get a better look.

title: Dispatch
text: Let's see what's got our little chief so wound up. Shall we?

title: Level Up
text: For me, how thoughtful of you?

title: Pat Head
text: Someone is getting more brazen by the day.

title: Deploy
text: I will personally see them off on their journey1
